articles.title: Nuno to stay as West Ham boss after relegation
articles.summary: Nuno Espirito Santo will stay on as West Ham manager to lead their fight to get back to the Premier League at the first attempt, the club says.

articles.title: Schmeichel retires because of serious shoulder injury
articles.summary: Kasper Schmeichel retires at the age of 39, with the Celtic and Denmark goalkeeper unable to recover sufficiently from a serious shoulder injury.

articles.title: 60 Palace 'troublemakers' ordered to leave Leipzig
articles.summary: Police say 60 Crystal Palace fans classified as "known troublemakers" have been ordered to leave Leipzig while two arrests were made before the Europa Conference League final.

articles.title: Northern Ireland boss O'Neill signs four-year extension
articles.summary: Northern Ireland manager Michael O'Neill has signed a four-year contract extension to keep him at the helm until 2032.

articles.title: How I won fantasy football in my first ever season - without using AI
articles.summary: Danish medical student Erik Ibsen, 23, says it's "insane" he beat more than 11 million FPL players.

articles.title: Quiz: Name every Conference League finalist
articles.summary: Crystal Palace are in Wednesday's Conference League final and are one match away from their first ever European trophy.

articles.title: 'Not here to put on a fashion show' - Osaka opponent hits out at viral outfit
articles.summary: Naomi Osaka's outfit in her first-round French Open match has drawn plenty of attention - but left her opponent unimpressed.

articles.title: Nuno to stay on as West Ham head coach
articles.summary: Nuno Espirito Santo will continue as West Ham boss, despite their relegation from the Premier League.

articles.title: Paul 'keen' for Ngannou fight or Fury rematch after return from injury
articles.summary: Jake Paul would be "keen" for a fight with Francis Ngannou or a rematch with Tommy Fury should the boxer return successfully from a broken jaw, his business partner Nakisa Bidarian told <em>Sky Sports...

articles.title: Unsung hero? Biggest disappointment? Fans rate your club's season
articles.summary: BBC Sport's Premier League club fan writers assess their team's performance as the domestic season comes to an end.

articles.title: Foden a 'victim' of football's packed schedule
articles.summary: Manchester City midfielder Phil Foden is a "victim" of football's packed fixture schedule after being left out of England's World Cup squad, says the chief executive of the PFA.

articles.title: Coventry's Lampard named LMA manager of the year
articles.summary: Frank Lampard is named the League Managers Association manager of the year after guiding Coventry back to the Premier League.

articles.title: 'Long time coming' as Shankland joins Rangers from Hearts
articles.summary: Scotland striker Lawrence Shankland says he is fulfilling his "dream" of joining "boyhood club" Rangers as he completes his transfer from Scottish Premiership rivals Heart of Midlothian.

articles.title: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
articles.summary: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.

articles.title: The 2025-26 Premier League season in alternative tables
articles.summary: BBC Sport presents some alternative Premier League tables, looking at set-pieces, xG, long shots, and more.

articles.title: The footballer setting record straight after 46 years
articles.summary: Roly Gregoire, Sunderland's first black player, sometimes wishes he had never played football because of the racist abuse he found too painful to talk about for 46 years.

articles.title: The Sunderland footballer setting record straight after 46 years
articles.summary: When Roly Gregoire quit football in 1980 after suffering a knee injury, he had faced so much racism that he could not bear to watch football for many years.

articles.title: Celtic and former Leicester goalkeeper Schmeichel retires
articles.summary: Kasper Schmeichel has announced his retirement at the age of 39.

articles.title: Southampton pay tribute as Udoh dies aged 21
articles.summary: Southampton FC and Royal Antwerp announce the death of former academy player Victor Udoh at the age of 21.
